name: education_near_miss_event_generates_oakline_car_fair
premise: A field trip bus broke down; chaperones are split on whether to charter private vans without vendor vetting. In Education, the situation tagged internally around education near miss event generates oakline car fair has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The trade is not abstract: it is care versus fairness under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Mei Okoye
agents.identity: I am Mei Okoye, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Education. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mira Park
agents.identity: I am Mira Park, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Education. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if care advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for fairness.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mei Okoye must choose under care versus fairness. What does Mei Okoye do?
